cluster_insights.description: Both insights reveal heightened volatility in the cattle market, which correlates with the current price proximity to resistance levels, indicating potential price movements.
supporting_insights: Live Cattle Future (front month) (February) exhibits lower volatility but is near resistance.
Live Cattle Future (second month) (April) indicates heightened volatility and proximity to resistance levels.
Live Cattle Future (third month) (June) shows heightened volatility and current price near resistance.
cluster_insights.significance: Understanding volatility's impact on price can guide traders in anticipating market movement near resistance levels.

cluster_insights.description: Both insights indicate low traded volumes, suggesting a lack of investor engagement and caution in the market.
supporting_insights: Live Cattle Future (front month) (February) shows a -83.72% change in trading volume.

Live Cattle Future (third month) (June) has a volume change of -40.58%.
cluster_insights.significance: Low trading volumes may reflect investor hesitancy, which is critical in determining market sentiment.
